_comment: Off-field talisman profiles, researched from public reporting (June 2026). 'adj' is a manual Elo nudge applied ONLY when the player is on the pitch — use it for genuine, citable status (injury doubt, returning rusty, peak form beyond stats). Keep it small (+-10) and 0 when the player is simply fit (the form/availability model already covers that). Names must match ESPN displayName exactly.

Lionel Messi.note: May hamstring overload (muscle fatigue, not structural); returned to full training, leading the Golden Boot race

Kylian Mbappé.note: Missed 4 league games with a knee injury in early 2026; declared fully fit, scored twice vs Senegal

Erling Haaland.note: 4 goals in 2 matches; scored in 12 consecutive competitive Norway appearances

Vinícius Júnior.note: No fitness issues; but Brazil's attacking depth is thin - Rodrygo (ACL) and Estêvão out, Neymar conditioning uncertain
